title: Jade VS
description: Provides compatibility between Jade and Valkyrien Skies
body:
# Jade VS

Provides compatibility for Valkyrien Skies or Sable with Jade.

It fixed the serverside block distance check for Jade when you requesting block datas. So you can view addition information on VS ship with Jade.

It also allows you easily check block mass, block velocity, angular velocity on multiplayer.
